text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now that training's over, it's time for that special
reward... Pretty please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I saw it in my morning fortune-telling session! "A
shuttle full of sparkles." That can only mean—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? Taiki Shuttle? Oh, no, no, no! I was—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Could this mean that Taiki is the shuttle
that brings the sparkles?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oho! So you want somethin' sparkly, do ya? Then,
I got just the thing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
(Great! Taiki's from the US, so I bet it's a great
big piggy bank full of silver dollars!)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Come partner runnin' with me! Your skin'll shine
real good with the sweat I'll have you workin'
up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You want us to go partner running? I guess that
would be one way to create an abundance of
sparkles...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, haha! I'd love to, but I need my trainer's
permission first...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What should I do? Run with Taiki... or do you
have a reward for me?
choice_data_list: I guess I can prepare something...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Argh! I had an feeling you'd say that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru puts her all into her extra
training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! I worked super hard today, after all! So,
what kind of sparkly reward have you got for
me? ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, wait just a gosh darn minute! Didn't you say
you were going to "fill Taiki Shuttle up with
sparkles"?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I meet both their expectations by giving them two
sparkling... cans of juice.
